settings.title: One Family. One Team. Together anything is Possible.

settings.editor: Our knowledge, experience and capabilities mean that we can provide an in-house solution to tackle even the toughest challenge, yet our family values ensure we treat every project individually.
We have financial stability based on a robust balance sheet and believe that this, coupled with performing responsibly is key to our success…
From major infrastructure projects to responding to emergencies, our range of vital transportation services help to keep the UK and Ireland moving.
We work in partnership with the Environment Agency to deliver an extensive range of Civil Engineering, MEICA and Electrical Services.
This is an exciting time in the UK energy industry, as first generation nuclear assets are superceded by a new, renewable energy infrastructure.
We have a long, proud history of working in the natural resources sector, providing offshore and onshore oil, gas and energy infrastructure services.
We offer all the mechanical, civil, electrical and structural engineering expertise required for complex engineering projects.
The depth and reach of our tunnelling service portfolio is unmatched in the industry.
As a full-service engineering and construction business, we have the multi-disciplinary in-house capabilities to provide fully integrated design, engineering and maintenance services.
Our 24-hour maintenance services include planned and reactive maintenance, as well as emergency-response capabilities.
We can offer years of experience and a comprehensive understanding of design principles to make sure projects are delivered on time and on budget.
We work with utility and energy companies on major infrastructure projects across the world, drawing on our marine and civil engineering skills.

settings.title: We have 36 years experience in Construction.

No job is too large, too small, too complex or too challenging for us. Our unique network of decentralized offices, backed by a multi-billion dollar organization, allows us to tackle projects of any size, in any market.
